title: crataegus quaesita var. floridana
intro: Crataegus quaesita var. floridana, also known as the Florida hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree in the family Rosaceae, native to the southeastern United States. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crataegus quaesita var. floridana include potential cardiovascular support, reduced cholesterol levels, and improved blood circulation. In herbal preparations, it is often combined with other plants and used in teas, tinctures, or capsules to promote overall health and well-being.
